nasb.text: And there arose also a dispute among them as to which one of them was regarded to be greatest.

esv.text: A dispute also arose among them, as to which of them was to be regarded as the greatest.

cnv.text: 門徒中間又起了爭論：他們中間誰是最大的。

ccb.text: 门徒又开始争论他们当中谁最伟大。

csbs.text: 门徒之间也起了争论：他们当中谁算是更大的。
